passive.name: Junkyard Titan
passive.description: Every spell Rumble casts gives him Heat. When he reaches 50% Heat he reaches Danger Zone, granting all his basic abilities bonus effects. When he reaches 100% Heat, he starts Overheating, gaining bonus Attack Speed and granting his basic attacks bonus damage, but making him unable to cast spells for a few seconds.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Rumble}} [[Champion ability|basic ability]] casts generate {{tip|Heat}}, which gradually expires after a few seconds without generating Heat. Rumble enters the ''Danger Zone'' while he has at least {{tip|Heat|50 Heat}}, and becomes ''Overheated'' at {{tip|Heat|Max Heat}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|[[File:Junkyard Titan 2.png|24px]] Danger Zone:}} '''Rumble's''' basic abilities are empowered.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|[[File:Junkyard Titan 3.png|24px]] Overheated:}} '''Rumble's''' abilities are disabled as his {{tip|Heat}} decays over a few seconds. During this time, his basic attacks gain {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} and deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} based on the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Rumble's''' [[Champion ability|basic ability]] casts generate {{tip|Heat}}, which refreshes on subsequent casts and decays by {{tip|Heat|10 Heat}} per second after not using any basic ability within 4 seconds or ''{{ai|The Equalizer|Rumble}}'' within 2 seconds. '''Rumble's''' mech enters the ''Danger Zone'' when at or above {{tip|Heat|50 Heat}}, and becomes ''Overheated'' while at {{tip|Heat|150 Heat}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Danger Zone:}} '''Rumble's''' mech enters the ''Danger Zone'', empowering his basic abilities.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Overheated:}} '''Rumble's''' mech becomes ''Overheated'', disabling his [[champion ability|abilities]] as his {{tip|Heat}} decays back down to 0 over 4 seconds. During this time, he gains {{sti|{{as|{{pp|50+((130-50)/17)*(x-1)*(0.7025+0.0175*(x-1))|key=%}} '''bonus''' attack speed}}}} and empowers his [[basic attack]]s to deal {{pp|5 to 40|color=magic damage}} {{as|(+ 25% AP)}} {{as|(+ 5% of the target's '''maximum''' health)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} {{tip|on-hit}}. The damage based on the target's health ratio is capped at {{pp|65+((150-65)/17)*(x-1)*(0.7025+0.0175*(x-1))}} against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.spellshield:
|notes = 
* While '''Rumble''' is ''overheating'', a [[File: Silence icon.png|20px]] ''Silenced'' icon will appear above him to signify he cannot cast [[champion ability|abilities]]. This is visible to all units.
* The attacks do not deal the '''bonus''' damage against [[structures]].

Q.name: Flamespitter
Q.description: Rumble torches opponents in front of him, dealing magic damage in a cone for 3 seconds. While in Danger Zone this damage is increased.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rumble}} activates a flamethrower for a short time that continually deals {{as|magic damage}} in a frontal cone.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Junkyard Titan 2|Rumble|Danger Zone}} Bonus:}} ''Flamespitter's'' damage is increased.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rumble''' generates {{tip|Heat|20 Heat}} to activate his flamethrower for 3 seconds, dealing {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.25}} seconds to enemies hit in a frontal cone, reduced to 70% against {{tip|minions}}.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|{{#var:b1}} to {{#var:b5}}}} {{as|(+ {{fd|{{#var:r}}}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:hr1}} to {{#var:hr5}}}}% of target's '''maximum''' health)}}|Magic Damage Per Tick|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}/12 to {{#var:b5}}/12|round=3}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:r}}/12|round=2}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:hr1}}/12 to {{#var:hr5}}/12|round=3}}% of target's '''maximum''' health)}}}}<!--
-->{{st|Total Minion Damage|{{ap|({{#var:b1}} to {{#var:b5}})*{{#var:m1}}/100}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:r}}*({{#var:m1}}/100)}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|({{#var:hr1}} to {{#var:hr5}})*{{#var:m1}}/100}}% of target's '''maximum''' health)}}|Minion Damage Per Tick|{{ap|({{#var:b1}} to {{#var:b5}})*({{#var:m1}}/100)/12|round=3}} {{as|(+ {{ap|({{#var:r}}*{{#var:m1}}/100)/12|round=3}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|({{#var:hr1}} to {{#var:hr5}})*({{#var:m1}}/100)/12|round=3}}% of target's '''maximum''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|{{ai|Junkyard Titan 2|Rumble|Danger Zone}} Bonus:}} ''Flamespitter's'' [[damage]] is increased by 50%.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Total Enhanced Damage|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}*1.5 to {{#var:b5}}*1.5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:r}}*1.5}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:hr1}}*1.5 to {{#var:hr5}}*1.5}}% of target's '''maximum''' health)}}|Enhanced Damage Per Tick|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}*1.5/12 to {{#var:b5}}*1.5/12}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:r}}*1.5/12}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:hr1}}*1.5/12 to {{#var:hr5}}*1.5/12}}% of target's '''maximum''' health)}}}}<!--
-->{{st|Total Enhanced Minion Damage|{{ap|({{#var:b1}} to {{#var:b5}})*({{#var:m1}}/100)*1.5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:r}}*{{#var:m1}}/100*1.5}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|({{#var:hr1}} to {{#var:hr5}})*{{#var:m1}}/100*1.5}}% of target's '''maximum''' health)}}|Enhanced Minion Damage Per Tick|{{ap|({{#var:b1}} to {{#var:b5}})*({{#var:m1}}/100)/12*1.5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|({{#var:r}}*{{#var:m1}}/100)/12*1.5}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|(({{#var:hr1}} to {{#var:hr5}})*({{#var:m1}}/100))/12*1.5|round=4}}% of target's '''maximum''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''Flamespitter's'' damage based on the target's health ratio against monsters is capped at {{pp|65+((300-65)/17)*(x-1)*(0.7025+0.0175*(x-1))}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Flamespitter'' will deal an additional tick of damage to a minion if it would die to its per-tick damage.
* '''Rumble''' will instantly turn to face the cursor if he is not moving when ''Flamespitter'' is cast.

W.name: Scrap Shield
W.description: Rumble pulls up a shield, protecting him from damage and granting him a quick burst of speed. While in Danger Zone, the shield strength and speed bonus is increased.
W.tooltip:
Rumble tosses up a barrier, gaining {{ totalshield }} Shield for {{ shieldduration.1 }} seconds and {{ movespeed*100 }}% Move Speed for {{ movespeedduration }} second.

Danger Zone: The barrier grants {{ empoweredshield }} Shield and {{ empoweredms }} Move Speed instead.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rumble}} briefly {{tip|shields}} himself and gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Junkyard Titan 2|Rumble|Danger Zone}} Bonus:}} ''Scrap Shield's'' effects are increased.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rumble''' generates {{tip|Heat|20 Heat}} to grant himself a {{tip|shield}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Rumble''' also gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for {{tt|1 to {{fd|1.32}} seconds.|See notes}}
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|{{ai|Junkyard Titan 2|Rumble|Danger Zone}} Bonus:}} ''Scrap Shield's'' shield strength and {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} are increased in effectiveness by 50%.
wiki_detail.leveling3:
{{st|Enhanced Shield Strength|{{ap|25*1.5 to 145*1.5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25*1.5}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|4*1.5}}% of '''maximum''' health)}}}}
{{st|Enhanced Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|10*1.5 to 30*1.5}}%}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The movement speed buff is supposed to last for 1 second, but due to a bug may last {{rutngt|0.25}} longer.
** Like most buffs, the stat bonus is already only gained at the next stat update (every {{rutngt|0.25}}). Despite this, the duration still inconsistent.

E.name: Electro Harpoon
E.description: Rumble launches a harpoon, electrocuting his target with magic damage, slowing their Move Speed, and reducing their Magic Resist. Rumble can carry 2 harpoons at a time. While in Danger Zone the damage and slow percentage is increased.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rumble}} shoots a harpoon in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|slow|slows}} the first enemy hit, reducing their {{sti|mpen|{{as|magic resist}}}} for a few seconds. These effects can stack with multiple harpoons.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Rumble''' periodically [[stocks]] an ''Electro Harpoon'', up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|{{ai|Junkyard Titan 2|Rumble|Danger Zone}} Bonus:}} ''Electro Harpoon's'' effects are increased.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rumble''' generates {{tip|Heat|20 Heat}} to shoot a harpoon in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit, inflicting them with {{sti|magic penetration|{{as|magic resistance reduction}}}} for 4 seconds and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them for 2 seconds. These effects [[stack]] additively with multiple harpoons, refreshing their duration and stacking up to 2 times.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Rumble''' periodically [[stocks]] an ''Electro Harpoon'' charge, up to a maximum of 2.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|{{ai|Junkyard Titan 2|Rumble|Danger Zone}} Bonus:}} ''Electro Harpoon's'' effects are increased by 50%.
wiki_detail.description4: ''If '''Rumble''' casts Electro Harpoon before his mech becomes {{ai|Junkyard Titan 3|Rumble|Overheated}}, he may still use another charge within 3 seconds of the initial cast.''

R.name: The Equalizer
R.description: Rumble fires off a group of rockets, creating a wall of flames that damages and slows enemies.
R.tooltip:
Rumble launches a line of rockets, creating a burning trail that lasts {{ trailduration }} seconds, Slowing by {{ slowamount }}% and dealing {{ damagepersecond }} magic damage per second.

Rumble can control the direction of the trail by clicking and dragging while casting this Ability.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rumble}} deploys a barrage of rockets along the target path that create a field which lingers for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Enemies within the area are continually dealt {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rumble''' deploys a barrage of rockets along the target path that land in a line over {{fd|0.75}} seconds, creating a field of fire for {{fd|4.5}} seconds after the last rocket lands.
wiki_detail.description2: Enemies struck by the impact or within the field are marked as ''Burning'' for 1 second, which deals {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.5}} seconds, {{tip|slow|slows}} by 35%, and refreshes continuously while in the area.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Magic Damage Per Tick|{{ap|70 to 140}} {{as|(+ {{fd|17.5}}% AP)}}}}
{{st|Minimum Magic Damage|{{ap|70*2 to 140*2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|17.5*2}}% AP)}}|Maximum Magic Damage|{{ap|70*5*2 to 140*5*2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|17.5*5*2}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.target range: 1700 <!--Indicator override says 1750 range, but you do have to walk into range for 1700-->
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|-175|Damage range behind vector origin}} / {{tt|1135|Maximum damage range forward, estimated}}
wiki_detail.width: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|410 - {{fd|368.4}}|Widest and thinnest point of the chain of circles, respectively}}
wiki_detail.cast time: None / {{tt|{{fd|0.5833}}|Starts after the spell is cast}}
_comments: Indicator override says 1750 range, but you do have to walk into range for 1700
